positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed, central composition featuring stylized cosmic bioluminescent forest elements. Visualize massive, symmetrical glowing mushrooms interwoven with geometric constellations and delicate fern fronds. The color palette is restricted to deep midnight blues, vibrant aqua teals, luminous lavender, and electric cyan against a black void background. Use stark silhouette contrast and glowing internal light sources (luminescence). The style must be a blend of sacred geometry and hyper-detailed Art Nouveau illustration, rendered with crisp vector-like edges and an ethereal, magical quality. Suitable for a wearable textile print, emphasizing clean lines and high visual impact. Full frame, no distractions.
negative: blurry, noisy, low detail, artifacts, poorly drawn, out of frame, text, watermark, logo, trademark, celebrity, character, graffiti, human figure, dirty, grunge, sketch, realistic photography
